headlines.title: Republicans cancel votes amid GOP fight over Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Objections to President Donald Trump’s controversial “anti-weaponization” fund prompted Senate Republicans to postpone votes to fund ICE and the Border Patrol until June.

headlines.title: NASCAR legend Kyle Busch dies at age 41
headlines.description: NASCAR announced that racing legend Kyle Busch has died at the age of 41 after being hospitalized with a severe illness.

headlines.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
headlines.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

headlines.title: SpaceX launches prototype of Starship rocket in crucial test flight
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as SpaceX launches the twelfth test flight of Starship. The company claims the third-generation prototype, dubbed V3, is larger, more powerful and a step closer to being fully reusable. The rocket is scheduled to liftoff from SpaceX's StarBase in Brownsville, Texas.

headlines.title: DNC releases long-delayed 2024 autopsy, despite party frustrations with its findings
headlines.description: Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin on Thursday released the party’s autopsy report on the 2024 election after facing intense pressure to do so

headlines.title: Military healthcare contractor issues apology to 4 million beneficiaries
headlines.description: A contractor that administers the military’s healthcare benefits to more than 4 million people issued a broad apology to its beneficiaries this week for problems with its coverage

headlines.title: Suicides rise in ICE detention, 911 calls detail serious cases of self-harm
headlines.description: Suicides rise in ICE detention, 911 calls detail serious cases of self-harm

headlines.title: SpaceX launches prototype of Starship rocket in crucial test flight
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as SpaceX launches the twelfth test flight of Starship. The company claims the third-generation prototype, dubbed V3, is larger, more powerful and a step closer to being fully reusable. The rocket is scheduled to liftoff from SpaceX's StarBase in Brownsville, Texas.

headlines.title: Trump says he’ll ‘try’ to attend son’s wedding this weekend but it’s ‘not good timing’
headlines.description: The president said that due to the Iran war and “other things,” he wasn’t sure if he’d be attending the nuptials of Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson this weekend.

headlines.title: Trump’s $1.8B fund isn’t officially open yet. That hasn’t stopped applications.
headlines.description: Applications are already rolling into the Justice Department from hopefuls aiming for some of the nearly $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund, even though the process can’t officially begin until commissioners are chosen to decide how the money is doled out.

headlines.title: The biggest lesson from Trump’s retribution campaign: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen shares his top takeaway from President Donald Trump’s efforts this month to unseat fellow Republicans.

headlines.title: GLP-1 drugs may reduce the risk of cancer progressing, study suggests
headlines.description: GLP-1 drugs may be linked to a lower risk of cancer progression, according to new research that will be presented next week at the American Society of Clinical Oncology’s annual meeting.
